title: main.c led_set inline function defined but only used conditionally
description: In main.c:43-51, led_set() is defined as static inline inside #if DT_NODE_EXISTS(DT_ALIAS(led0)). If LED is present but led_configured is never set true (GPIO init fails), all led_set calls become no-ops. The function is well-designed but depends on global state (led_configured) that may not be obvious to callers. Consider documenting this dependency or logging when led_set is called before configuration.
